title: Credential expiry (day 91)
capability: survive the 90-day Fisconline credential expiry; alert ops before a merchant can no longer sell
persona_ref: PERSONA.md week 4 ops reality (90-day expiry, manual first login) + Tier 3 silent catastrophe

traps.detail: a comment claims a daily 24h-JWT refresh keeps a merchant logged in forever
traps.correct: the 24h JWT and the ~90-day Fisconline credential are different lifetimes; refreshing the JWT does nothing for the 90-day expiry, which must be tracked and alerted before it lapses
